description: Presents a structured form to collect initial user or organizational data.
Cryptographically verifies the identity and authority of the acting user.
Pauses execution until explicit cryptographic consent is provided by the authorized user.
Assigns a specific task to a defined agentic persona within the Facilitation Team.
Directs an agent to draft a formal GAP deliverable based on provided templates and context.
Invokes a sub-protocol (like council-review), pausing current execution until the sub-protocol resolves.
Final executive review node. Requires CEO signature to proceed to Execution or Closed states.
Writes the current state, resolution, or artifact hash immutably to the ExoChain DAG.
Routes a proposal to a specific Decision Forum panel for evaluation and voting.
Aggregates votes from multiple panels against configured quorum and threshold rules.
Scans a payload to ensure it does not violate any of the 10 Constitutional Invariants.
Collects system performance, DAG events, and error rates for CQI analysis.
Bridges internal GAP workflows to external systems like ExoForge for compilation.
